name: Ithaka: A Fight To Free Julian Assange
original_name: Ithaka: A Fight To Free Julian Assange
overview: Filmed over two years across the UK, Europe and the US, this two-part documentary follows 76-year-old retired builder, John Shipton's tireless campaign to save his son, Julian Assange.

trailers.title: Ithaka: A Fight To Free Julian Assange | Trailer
